_metadata.description: Merge Agent — promotes one staged file from source_docs/dropbox/ into its target source_docs/<short_name>.md, preserves YAML front matter, updates _refresh_log.json, deletes the dropbox file.
_metadata.instructions: JSON = the procedure, the suspect-overwrite rule, the front-matter shape. MD = the why. Update both together.

additional_references: source_docs/_refresh_log.json (target log file this agent writes)

agent_details.description: Promotes a single manually-staged file from source_docs/dropbox/ to source_docs/<short_name>.md with front-matter preservation, _refresh_log.json update, and dropbox cleanup.

agent_type.description: Linear workflow: identify → read both files + log → suspect-overwrite check → propose plan → confirm → write target → write log → delete dropbox → verify → A3 report.

steps.name: Identify
steps.description: Resolve dropbox file path + target source_docs path. Either both supplied, or supplied as short_name (target = source_docs/<short_name>.md, dropbox = source_docs/dropbox/<short_name>.md).

steps.name: Read
steps.description: Read dropbox file body. Read target file (front matter + body + existing size). Read source_docs/_refresh_log.json. P-001 — never skip the reads.

steps.name: SuspectOverwriteCheck
steps.description: Apply suspect_overwrite_rule. If target exists and is non-placeholder (existing body > 1000 bytes) AND new body < 80% of existing body → halt per P-003. Stage incoming as source_docs/<short_name>.md.new and surface the regression.

steps.name: ProposePlan
steps.description: Per P-002, emit the change plan: new front matter, new body size, _refresh_log.json delta, dropbox deletion. Wait for user confirmation. NI-mode skip: in non-interactive mode, log the plan to the runlog and proceed if no defects detected.

steps.name: WriteTarget
steps.description: Build new front matter: preserve existing platform/label/source_url/notes; set last_fetched=<today>; set fetch_status=success (or supplied value); set/update size_bytes if the existing front matter carried it (omit if not). Concatenate front matter + body. Write atomically to source_docs/<short_name>.md.

steps.name: WriteLog
steps.description: Read _refresh_log.json fresh, mutate sources[<short_name>] = { last_attempted: <today>, action: 'updated'|'added', size_before, size_after, fetch_status: success, notes: <merged or new> }, write back. If write fails, HALT per P-003 — do not leave cache file ahead of log.

steps.name: DeleteDropboxFile
steps.description: Delete source_docs/dropbox/<short_name>.md ONLY after target+log writes verified. P-007 — do not delete adjacent files in dropbox that weren't part of this merge.

steps.name: Verify
steps.description: Re-read target file; parse front matter; confirm last_fetched is today, size_bytes (if present) matches on-disk body size. Re-read _refresh_log.json; confirm parses + the new entry is present. Confirm dropbox file absent.

steps.name: A3Report
steps.description: Emit P-006 A3-style report: current state (existing size + last_fetched), target state (new size + last_fetched=today), countermeasure (the merge that was applied), verification (the step-8 checks that passed), risks (front-matter shape changes, log JSON shape changes).

workflow_based.entry_point: Conversational invocation with dropbox_path or short_name
workflow_based.exit_point: A3 change report + updated source_docs file + updated _refresh_log.json + deleted dropbox file

io_contract.description: Single conversational invocation; one file promoted per invocation.

inputs.name: dropbox_or_short_name
inputs.format: Either a path to source_docs/dropbox/<file>.md, OR a bare short_name (resolves both paths via filename mapping).

inputs.name: platform_label_url_overrides
inputs.format: Optional. JSON-shaped string with {platform, label, source_url} — only required when target does not exist AND doc_refresh_agent.json has no entry for the short_name. Skipped otherwise.

outputs.name: merged_target_file
outputs.format: source_docs/<short_name>.md with preserved+updated front matter + new body
outputs.conditions: Written only after confirmation; never silently overwrites without the plan-and-confirm gate.

outputs.name: updated_refresh_log
outputs.conditions: Written in the same transaction as the target file. Halt if write fails.

outputs.name: a3_report
outputs.format: Markdown A3 change report (Current → Target → Countermeasure → Verification → Risks)
outputs.example:
## A3: Promote openai_handoffs from dropbox

**Current state**: ...

io_contract.side_effects: Writes source_docs/<short_name>.md; writes source_docs/_refresh_log.json; deletes source_docs/dropbox/<short_name>.md. No other filesystem effects. Does not modify any update_agents/* file or any template/skill file.

behavioral_discipline._description: Cross-cutting behavioral discipline. Source: knowledge/behavioral_discipline.md/.json. interaction_pattern derived via the standard decision flow.

_skipped_principles_rationale.P-005: Single-step write workflow per invocation (one file promoted). Decomposition into smaller sub-steps does not apply.

primary_data.description: Merge procedure, suspect-overwrite rule arithmetic, front-matter schema, _refresh_log.json schema.

value.on_halt_action: Write incoming content to source_docs/<short_name>.md.new (sibling stage), leave target unchanged, leave dropbox file in place, surface 'Cannot proceed — incoming body is X% of existing (threshold 80%). Either confirm regression is intentional or replace dropbox file.'

data.description: Defends against accidental promote of error pages, login HTML, or truncated fetches. Mirrors doc_refresh_agent's automated defense for the manual-fetch path.
data.notes: If the threshold in doc_refresh_agent.json changes, update here too.

value.format: YAML between two `---` lines at the very top of the file (lines 1 and N for some small N)

field_update_on_merge.platform: preserved from existing target front matter, OR supplied as input when target is new
field_update_on_merge.label: preserved or supplied
field_update_on_merge.fetch_status: set to 'success' unless caller specifies otherwise
field_update_on_merge.fetch_error: set to 'none' on success; otherwise the error string
field_update_on_merge.notes: appended (preserves existing) or replaced (when caller supplies a new note)
field_update_on_merge.size_bytes: recomputed from the body byte length AFTER the closing --- — written only if existing front matter carried this field

data.description: Authoritative front-matter shape for source_docs/*.md. Same shape doc_refresh_agent writes.
data.notes: Three sources currently DO use size_bytes; many do not. Don't add the field if it wasn't there.

value.key: <short_name> (no .md suffix; matches the source_docs filename basename)

fields.size_before: int — body byte count of the target BEFORE this merge (0 if action=added)
fields.size_after: int — body byte count of the target AFTER this merge
fields.notes: string; either replaces or prepends to existing per caller preference (default prepend with ' || PRIOR: ' separator, matching the convention already in _refresh_log.json)

value.top_level_field_update: Update top-level _refresh_log.json → last_refresh_run to today's date

data.notes: Matches the existing entries' shape — do not introduce new fields.

value.atomicity_guarantees: Writes are sequential, not transactional. If step 6 (log write) fails, target file is already written but log is stale. Halt and surface the inconsistency — do not roll back the target write (Per P-003 surface, do not paper over).

data.description: Pointer to the canonical step list.

primary_data.usage_note: The agent reads primary_data into memory at start of each invocation. Threshold + schema lookups happen against these tables.

files: update_agents/doc_refresh_agent.json (for source URL lookups when adding a new source)

optional_dependencies.description: Pure filesystem agent. No LLM required for the merge itself (LLM context only needed to emit the A3 report and the proposal message).

validation.description: How to verify the merge was correct.
pre_run_checklist: Dropbox file exists and is non-empty
If target exists, target file parses and has a front matter block
If target does NOT exist, caller supplied platform/label/source_url OR doc_refresh_agent.json → primary_data.sources has an entry for this short_name
post_run_checklist: Target file begins with --- and has a parseable YAML front matter block
Front matter last_fetched matches today's date
Body size matches size_after in _refresh_log.json (within ±2 bytes for trailing-newline tolerance)
_refresh_log.json → sources[<short_name>] is present with today's last_attempted
Dropbox file no longer exists at source_docs/dropbox/<short_name>.md
No other file in update_agents/, knowledge/, or source_docs/ was modified
success_criteria: Target + log + dropbox-delete all completed; verification passes
A3 report emitted with non-empty current/target/countermeasure/verification fields
Suspect-overwrite check fired correctly (halted when it should have; passed when it should have)

discipline_validation._description: BD-QC checks. See knowledge/behavioral_discipline.json → qc_checks (BD-QC-001 through BD-QC-007).
required_checks: BD-QC-001 — `## Behavioral Discipline (core)` section present in agent MD
BD-QC-002 — N/A (workflow agent, not llm_agent; per retrofit-guidance-step-5 logic, llm_agent system_prompt embed is not applicable)
BD-QC-003 — applicable_principles match interaction_pattern's always_include array (single_write_workflow → P-001/002/003/004/006/007/008/009/010)
BD-QC-004 — at least one trust marker in validation.test_cases output (suspect-overwrite halt test surfaces 'I cannot proceed because X' — P-003 trust marker)
BD-QC-005 — every override has a documented reason (only P-005 is skipped; rationale in _skipped_principles_rationale)
BD-QC-006 — P-001, P-003, P-007, P-010 all present (CRITICAL)

test_cases.name: Promote a manually-fetched larger doc over a placeholder
test_cases.input: dropbox_or_short_name=openai_handoffs (target exists at ~3KB placeholder, dropbox has full ~13KB doc)
test_cases.expected_output: Suspect-overwrite check PASSES (13KB > 0.8 × 3KB). Target written with new body, front matter last_fetched=today. _refresh_log.json[openai_handoffs].size_after ≈ 13000. Dropbox file deleted. A3 report emitted.

test_cases.name: Suspect-overwrite halts merge
test_cases.input: dropbox_or_short_name=anthropic_files (target exists at ~12KB, dropbox accidentally contains 1KB anti-bot HTML)
test_cases.expected_output: Suspect-overwrite check FAILS (1KB < 0.8 × 12KB). Agent emits 'I cannot proceed because the incoming body is 8% of existing (threshold 80%). Staged as source_docs/anthropic_files.md.new for review.' Target unchanged. Dropbox file unchanged. P-003 trust marker present.

test_cases.name: New source — target does not yet exist
test_cases.input: dropbox_or_short_name=anthropic_workspaces (target does NOT exist; doc_refresh_agent.json also has no entry; caller supplies platform_label_url_overrides)
test_cases.expected_output: action='added' in _refresh_log.json with size_before=0. Front matter built from caller-supplied fields. Target written. Dropbox deleted. A3 report notes 'first-time add'.

test_cases.name: Halt if log write fails
test_cases.input: dropbox_or_short_name=openai_tracing AND _refresh_log.json is read-only by filesystem permissions
test_cases.expected_output: Target write succeeds (step 5). Log write fails (step 6). Agent HALTS per P-003: 'I cannot proceed because _refresh_log.json write failed; target file is now ahead of log — please restore log permissions and re-run.' Dropbox file is NOT deleted.

test_cases.name: Plan-before-act required (P-002)
test_cases.expected_output: Agent emits 'Plan: ... — confirm?' message before any write. No file modified until confirmation.

tolerance.numeric: size_bytes / size_after comparisons allow ±2 bytes for trailing-newline differences
tolerance.string: fetch_status must be exact match against the enum 'success'|'partial'|'manual'|'failed'
tolerance.structural: Front matter field order preserved when reading + writing the same file

commands: python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('source_docs/_refresh_log.json'))" — verify log is valid JSON post-merge
make_agent_qc — validate this spec via the QC meta-skill in make_agent_qc.md/.json

known_failures.cause: Caller specified short_name but source_docs/dropbox/<short_name>.md does not exist
known_failures.mitigation: Halt per P-003; do not fabricate or fall back. Surface the missing file.

known_failures.cause: Existing target file does not have a parseable --- YAML --- header (legacy file)
known_failures.mitigation: Halt; ask user whether to (a) rebuild front matter from doc_refresh_agent.json entry, or (b) abort. Do NOT silently overwrite.
Halt before any writes; surface the parse error and the line number. Do not attempt to repair.
Target is ahead of log. Halt; surface inconsistency; advise the user to re-run after fixing the cause OR to manually edit the log entry. Do not roll back the target.

knowledge_files.purpose: Lookup table of the 34 cached platform docs — short_name → platform/topic/url. Optional for merge_agent (it can look up by filename), but pairs naturally for any UI that wants to show 'what is this short_name?' during merge confirmation.

changes: Initial merge_agent — single_write_workflow shape. Promotes one dropbox file per invocation with front-matter preservation, _refresh_log.json update, and dropbox cleanup.
Pulls suspect_overwrite_threshold (0.20) from doc_refresh_agent.json — mirrors automated-fetch defense for manual-fetch path.
Generated by dogfooding make_agent.{md,json} on 2026-05-13. Real consumer: doc_refresh_workflow (specialist 2).
